summary: REQ-1 and REQ-3 appear implemented in the modified page components, but REQ-2 is not satisfied because no new static image asset file was added under frontend/public/assets/generated in the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the newly generated building image to the frontend as a static asset under "frontend/public/assets/generated" with the exact filename "home-hero-building.dim_1920x1080.png" and reference it from the Home page hero.
missing_requirements.reason: The Home page now references "/assets/generated/home-hero-building.dim_1920x1080.png", but the diff shows no added files, so the required image asset does not appear to have been added to the repository under frontend/public/assets/generated.
